title: avena fatua var. sterilis
intro: Avena fatua var. sterilis, commonly known as wild oat sterile or sterile oat grass, is a variant of the wild oat plant that has been rendered sterile through artificial breeding. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating sleep disorders, anxiety, and restlessness. The seeds of Avena fatua var. sterilis are considered to have health benefits, including calming the nervous system, promoting relaxation, and reducing stress. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions for its medicinal and health benefits.
